sys_remote_update_set.description: Surfboard Reservation application for requesting and reserving surfboards. Includes surfboard inventory table, reservation request table, left nav application with modules for creating requests and managing boards.
sys_remote_update_set.name: Surfboard Reservation App

sys_update_xml.name: sys_db_object_surf_board_tbl
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_db_object"><sys_db_object action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><caller_access/><client_scripts_access/><create_access>true</create_access><create_access_controls>false</create_access_controls><delete_access>true</delete_access><description>Surfboard inventory — tracks all boards available for reservation</description><is_extendable>true</is_extendable><label>Surfboard</label><live_feed_enabled>false</live_feed_enabled><name>u_surfboard</name><number_ref/><provider_class/><read_access>true</read_access><super_class display_value="Task">task</super_class><sys_class_name>sys_db_object</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-21 00:00:00</sys_created_on><sys_id>2d7751ebcde84246af7d4fffbe740598</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Surfboard</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_db_object_surf_board_tbl</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-21 00:00:00</sys_updated_on><update_access>true</update_access><user_role/><ws_access>true</ws_access></sys_db_object></record_update>
